---
title: "NBA bets"
date: 2025-12-01
toc: true
categories: ["probability", "inference", "statistics", 'modelling', 'betting', 'bookmaking', 'machine learning']
code-fold: false
code-tools: true
---

```{python}
%config InlineBackend.figure_format = 'svg'

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from pathlib import Path

plt.style.use("ggplot")

datapath = Path("./data/games")
games = pd.read_csv(datapath / "Games.csv", parse_dates=["gameDateTimeEst"]).query(
    "gameDateTimeEst > '2007-08-01' and gameDateTimeEst < '2022-08-01'"
)

games = (
    games.assign(
        date=lambda f: f["gameDateTimeEst"].pipe(pd.to_datetime, errors="coerce")
    )
    .query("date.notna()")
    .assign(date=lambda f: f["date"].dt.date)
)

schedule = pd.read_csv(datapath / "LeagueSchedule24_25.csv")

team_histories = pd.read_csv(datapath / "TeamHistories.csv")
team_stats = pd.read_csv(datapath / "TeamStatistics.csv")
odds = (
    pd.read_csv(Path("./data/odds/oddsData.csv"), parse_dates=["date"])
    .assign(date=lambda f: f["date"].dt.date)
    .query("season not in (2020, 2012, 2021)")
)

team_stats.iloc[0]
```

```{python}
games.date.apply(type).value_counts()
```
```{python}
team_histories
```

```{python}
games
```

```{python}
odds
```

```{python}
odds.iloc[0]
```

```{python}
odds['home/visitor'].value_counts()
```

```{python}
odds_teams = odds['team'].value_counts().index.union(odds['opponent'].value_counts().index)
odds_teams
```

```{python}
games = games.assign(
    home_team_nick=lambda f: f["hometeamCity"]
    .str.cat(f["hometeamName"], sep=" ")
    .where(f["hometeamCity"].eq("Los Angeles"), f["hometeamCity"]),
    away_team_nick=lambda f: f["awayteamCity"]
    .str.cat(f["awayteamName"], sep=" ")
    .where(f["awayteamCity"].eq("Los Angeles"), f["awayteamCity"]),
)

home_index = games["home_team_nick"].value_counts().index

away_index = games["away_team_nick"].value_counts().index

games_teams = home_index.union(away_index).sort_values()
games_teams
```


```{python}
teams_map = {
    "Atlanta": "Atlanta",
    "Boston": "Boston",
    "Brooklyn": "Brooklyn",
    "Charlotte": "Charlotte",
    "Chicago": "Chicago",
    "Cleveland": "Cleveland",
    "Dallas": "Dallas",
    "Denver": "Denver",
    "Detroit": "Detroit",
    "Golden State": "Golden State",
    "Houston": "Houston",
    "Indiana": "Indiana",
    "LA Clippers": "Los Angeles Clippers",
    "LA Lakers": "Los Angeles Lakers",
    "Memphis": "Memphis",
    "Miami": "Miami",
    "Milwaukee": "Milwaukee",
    "Minnesota": "Minnesota",
    "New Jersey": "New Jersey",
    "New Orleans": "New Orleans",
    "New York": "New York",
    "Oklahoma City": "Oklahoma City",
    "Orlando": "Orlando",
    "Philadelphia": "Philadelphia",
    "Phoenix": "Phoenix",
    "Portland": "Portland",
    "Sacramento": "Sacramento",
    "San Antonio": "San Antonio",
    "Seattle": "Seattle",
    "Toronto": "Toronto",
    "Utah": "Utah",
    "Washington": "Washington",
}

odds = odds.assign(
    team_nick=lambda f: f["team"].map(teams_map),
    opponent_nick=lambda f: f["opponent"].map(teams_map),
)
```

```{python}
# Convert American moneyline to decimal odds (positive lines pay line/100: line/100, negative lines pay 100/|line|)
def moneyline_to_decimal(series: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
    ml = pd.to_numeric(series, errors="coerce")
    decimals = np.where(
        ml > 0,
        1 + ml / 100,
        np.where(ml < 0, 1 + 100 / (-ml), np.nan),
    )
    return pd.Series(decimals, index=series.index)


odds = odds.assign(
    decimal_odds_team=moneyline_to_decimal(odds["moneyLine"]),
    decimal_odds_opponent=moneyline_to_decimal(odds["opponentMoneyLine"]),
    overround=lambda f: f['decimal_odds_team'].pow(-1) + f['decimal_odds_opponent'].pow(-1) - 1,
)

odds
```


```{python}
odds.date.apply(type).value_counts()
```

```{python}
merged = pd.merge(
    games,
    odds,
    left_on=['date', 'home_team_nick'],
    right_on=['date', 'team_nick'],
    how='inner'
).assign(team_choice='home_team')


merged.iloc[0]

merged = merged.assign(year=lambda f: f['date'].pipe(pd.to_datetime).dt.year)

merged.season.value_counts()
```
```{python}
merged.iloc[:2]
```

```{python}
merged.iloc[0]
```

```{python}
merged.groupby("team_choice").agg(
    {"decimal_odds_team": "mean", "decimal_odds_opponent": "mean"}
)
```

```{python}
merged.overround.loc[lambda s: s.lt(0.1) & s.gt(0)].plot.hist(bins=40)
```
